spec_match.rationale: The page now exercises `InputEvent.inputType`, `getTargetRanges()`, cancelability, data/dataTransfer, StaticRange fallback, non-collapsed selection state, and all deletion rows including entire-soft-line deletion.

interactive.rationale: A contenteditable playground selects text, runs deletion commands, dispatches beforeinput/input events, applies the edit, and logs live API results.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and page H1/lede share the same framing and surface the same API affordances.

edge_cases.rationale: The playground surfaces feature detection, collapsed versus non-collapsed selections, missing InputEvent support, empty/no-op deletions, and synthetic versus trusted event behavior.

references.rationale: see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5173317243895808 so the cleanup script can recover this folder.

design_system.rationale: The new controls use shared CSS variables, paired button background and color, responsive grid constraints, and textContent-based readouts.

summary: Converted the deletion-type guide into an interactive beforeinput playground that demonstrates Chrome 145's non-collapsed selection deletion mapping and the related InputEvent fields.
